services.title: Services
services.rfq.sent: RFQ yatumiwa ku {count, plural, one {# vendor} other {# vendors}}

browse.title: Services
browse.subtitle: Sanga abapela services aba trustable mu Zambia yonse — kufuma ku beauty kufika ku home repairs.
browse.emptyTitle: Takuli services shilingana na filters shenu
browse.emptyBody: Esheni category nangu area imbi, nangu bwelako limbi pa listings shishiya.

detail.metaDescription: {title} mu {area}. Lolesha portfolio no kufwaya quote pa Vergeo5.
detail.requestQuoteHint: Landa umulimo wenu no kupoka quotes kufuma ku providers abalingana.

list.title: Services shenu
list.intro: Manage listings sha services abakashita bangalolesha no kufwaya quotes.

form.includesHint: Cimo pa line — cilaoneshwa nga checklist pa service page yenu.
form.bookableHint: Abakashita bangabook no kulipila deposit pa fixed price, ukwabula kufwaya quote first.
form.bookingPriceHint: Total price ya direct booking. Abakashita balipila deposit pano na balance nga umulimo wapwa.

errors.bookablePrice: Lekeni fixed booking price iyakila zero ukuleka direct booking.

postJob.title: Posta umulimo
postJob.subtitle: Landa ifyo mufwaya — providers abalingana bakatuma quotes.

description.label: Nshi mufwaya ukucita?
description.placeholder: E.g. Fixa kitchen tap iya leaking before Saturday

photos.label: Amaphoto (optional)
photos.help: Kufika ku 8 photos ukwafwilisha providers ukumfwikisha umulimo.

postJob.draftSaved: Draft yenu yalisungwa pa device iyi ukufika mwangila.

ack.sent: Twishibishe providers abalingana. Quotes shisangwa ukwisa mu nsiku imo.
ack.noMatch: Tatwasanga providers abalingana pano, lelo tukacitilako no kumwishibisha.

list.title: Imilimo yenu
list.intro: Compare quotes kufuma ku providers no kusala isuma.
list.emptyBody: Posteni umulimo ukupoka quotes kufuma ku providers abalingana.

quotes.compareIntro: Sorted by price, then provider rating. Quotes sha withdrawn na expired shilifiswa.
quotes.empty: Takuli quotes sha active pano — providers basangwa ukusuka mu nsiku imo.

decline.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Price iyakila, ndefwaya date yabwangu…

errors.forbidden: Mungacompare quotes pa imilimo yenu fye.
errors.notMatched: Uyu provider taali matched ku umulimo.

accept.title: Pokela iyi quote
accept.intro: Lipileni deposit ya {pct}% pano ukusunga {vendor}. Balance ilefwailwa nga umulimo wapwa.
accept.escrowNote: Deposit yenu yalisungwa na Vergeo5 no kufumya ku provider fye nga umulimo wapokelwa.

errors.notOwner: Mungapokela quotes pa imilimo yenu fye.
errors.mismatch: Iyo quote taikaliko pa uyu umulimo.

provider.title: Marka umulimo ugapwa
provider.intro: Ishibisheni customer ati umulimo wapwa. Bali na maola 48 ukukonfirma before auto-confirm no kufumya payment yenu.

errors.notProvider: Provider fye uwa assigned angamarka uyu umulimo ugapwa.
errors.generic: Tatwakwanisha ukumarka umulimo ugapwa. Esheni again.

customer.title: Konfirma ati umulimo wapwa
customer.intro: Konfirmisha ukufumya balance ku provider wenu. Nga tamucita cimo, tukakonfirma automatic after maola 48.
customer.awaitingProvider: Tulolesha provider wenu akamarke umulimo ugapwa.
customer.escrowNote: Mwalipila → Yasungwa na Vergeo5 → Yafumya ku provider nga mwakonfirma.
customer.reviewUnlocked: Natotela! Mungaleka review pa uyu provider.

errors.notMarked: Provider wenu taamarka umulimo ugapwa pano.

reviews.heading: Reviews sha uyu provider
reviews.subheading: Kufuma ku bakashita abamilimo iyi provider yapwisha.

form.title: Rate provider wenu
form.intro: Umulimo wenu wapwa — landeni ifyo fyacitike.

errors.generic: Tatwakwanisha ukutuma review yenu. Esheni again.

booking.title: Booka iyi service
booking.intro: Lipileni deposit ya {pct}% pano; balance ilefwailwa nga umulimo wapwa.
booking.escrowNote: Mwalipila → Yasungwa na Vergeo5 → Yafumya ku provider nga mwakonfirma ati umulimo wapwa.

errors.notBookable: Iyi service taikaliko pa direct booking pano.
errors.generic: Tatwakwanisha ukutampa booking yenu. Esheni again.
